Sun Yi Ś≠ęŚ£Ļ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Yi (Ś≠ęŚ£Ļ). Fled to Wei when Sun Chen tried to kill him, but killed by a mutiny. Sun Yi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
